title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLX. Games.
content:
[The following lines are repeated by the nurse when sliding her hand down the child's face.]


        My mother and your mother
            Went over the way;
        Said my mother to your mother,
            It's chop-a-nose day!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCLX. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
